MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS P.H.D. HOLDINGS, INC. and JAMES A. ROTH'S DEMURRER (TO COMPLAINT).
APPEARANCES: William S. Weisberg, Esq. of Weisberg & Miller 296-7070 for pltf & opposing party; Jeffrey V. Ta, Esq. of Bledsoe, Cathcart, Diestel, Pedersen & Treppa LLP 981-541 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling and adopted as follows: Demurrer overruled as to the 11th cause of action. Demurring party states that is the cause of action demurred to. Defendant shall file and serve its answer by April 27, 2009. Plaintiff to prepare an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. (302KOPP/JW) JUDGE: QUENTIN L. KOPP, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
